arts.ttl: Aston Villa favoured over Newcastle United and 'vulnerable' Chelsea in Champions League race
arts.sum: Former Aston Villa striker Dwight Yorke believes that his old club can pip rivals including Chelsea, Newcastle United and Nottingham Forest to a place in the Champions League for next season, despite an inconsistent campaign up to now. Yorke, who made almost 300 appearances for Villa and scored shy of 100 goals, believes that while the ongoing Champions League campaign will make Villa's Premier League bid a little more difficult, they possess the manager and the squad to fight on both fronts and nip in ahead of their rivals come the end of the season.

arts.ttl: ‘Remain interested’ – Aston Villa still keen on player despite his injury, to make fresh approach in summer
arts.sum: Last summer, Sporting refused to let Pedro Gonçalves leave unless his €80m clause is activated after Aston Villa showed interest. The Villans wanted to sign the winger in the winter market as they looked to add to their squad. arts.ttl: £370m Aston Villa boost as Chris Heck speaks out
arts.sum: It has been reported that Chris Heck hopes Aston Villa's revenue will reach up to £370m for this season Those earnings includes gate receipts and income from UEFA's newly created value pillar on top of the £42m which the club will be awarded in prize money.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola sends Jack Grealish transfer message as Aston Villa return stance clear
arts.sum: Manchester City boss Pep Guardiola has insisted that he will only judge former Aston Villa star Jack Grealish for his performances on the pitch. Latest Aston Villa news from BirminghamLive as Man City boss Pep Guardiola opens up on former Villans star Jack Grealish, who has struggled for the Premier League champions recently

arts.ttl: Aston Villa mega store update as Bullring location revealed
arts.sum: Aston Villa's new mega store in Birmingham's Bullring shopping centre is taking shape ahead of its opening in May. Paul O'Brien, director of leasing and commercialisation at Hammerson, said: "Aston Villa’s new store coming to Bullring is a great example of Hammerson’s occupier mix strategy, delivering best-in-class spaces that are exciting and unique in equal measure.

arts.ttl: Ryan Reynolds signed stars who rubbed shoulders with Marcus Rashford and Cristiano Ronaldo
arts.sum: Wrexham's Hollywood owners have brought some big names to the club since buying the Welsh side in 2020, with some counting the likes of Marcus Rashford among their old team-mates
